debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝³ : LinearOrder ι
E : Type u_4
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : InfSet ι
inst✝ : Bot ι
X : ι → Ω → E
t : ι
K : ℝ
ω : Ω
⊢ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤
    K +
      {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t}.indicator
        (fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω

failed_attempts:
by
  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  by_cases h : τ ω ≤ t
  · simp only [if_pos h, Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr h)]
    refine iSup_le fun s ↦ iSup_le fun hs ↦ ?_
    by_cases hsτ : s < τ ω
    · rw [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left hsτ.le]
      have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
        by_contra h_ge
        have h_hitting : τ ω ≤ s := HittingTime.is_le (t₁ := ⊥) (t₂ := s) bot_le (by simp [τ]) h_ge
        exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le hsτ h_hitting)
      exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (norm_nonneg _) |>.trans (add_le_add_right (le_of_lt this) _)
    · rw [not_lt] at hsτ
      rw [stoppedProcess, min_eq_right hsτ]
      linarith [norm_nonneg (stoppedValue X τ ω)]
  · simp only [if_neg h, Set.indicator_of_not_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr h |>.mt), add_zero]
    refine iSup_le fun s ↦ iSup_le fun hs ↦ ?_
    have hsτ : s < τ ω := lt_of_le_of_lt hs (lt_of_not_ge h)
    rw [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left hsτ.le]
    have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
      by_contra h_ge
      have h_hitting : τ ω ≤ s := HittingTime.is_le (t₁ := ⊥) (t₂ := s) bot_le (by simp [τ]) h_ge
      exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le hsτ h_hitting)
    exact le_of_lt this

  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  refine iSup₂_le fun s hs ↦ ?_
  rw [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_apply]
  split_ifs with h_le
  · rw [stoppedValue]
    cases le_total (τ ω) s with
    | inl h =>

    | inr h =>
      rw [min_eq_left h]
      have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by

        exact not_le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt h_hit h) h_hit
      exact le_add_of_le_of_nonneg (le_of_lt this) (norm_nonneg _)
  · rw [min_eq_left (lt_of_le_of_lt hs (not_le.mp h_le)).le, add_zero]
    have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
      by_contra hK
      have h_hit : τ ω ≤ s := hittingAfter_le bot_le hK
      exact not_le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt h_hit (not_le.mp h_le)) h_hit
    exact le_of_lt this

by
  apply ciSup_le
  intro s hs
  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  by_cases h : s < τ ω
  · rw [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left h.le]
    have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
      rw [← lt_hittingAfter_iff] at h
      simpa using h s ⟨bot_le, le_rfl⟩
    refine le_trans (le_of_lt this) ?_
    convert le_add_of_nonneg_right (a := K) ?_
    · simp only [add_zero]
    · split_ifs <;> simp only [norm_nonneg, zero_le]
  · rw [not_lt] at h
    rw [stoppedProcess, min_eq_right h]
    have hτ : τ ω ≤ t := h.trans hs
    simp only [hτ, Set.indicator_of_mem, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    rw [stoppedValue, WithTop.untopA_coe]
    conv_rhs => rw [add_comm]
    refine le_add_of_nonneg_right ?_
    -- If K < 0, the statement is false. Assuming K ≥ 0.
    try { linarith }

by
  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  simp only [stoppedProcess]
  apply iSup₂_le; intro s hs
  by_cases h : τ ω ≤ t
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem h]
    by_cases hs_lt : ↑s < τ ω
    · rw [stoppedValue, min_eq_left hs_lt.le]
      have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
        rw [hittingAfter_lt_iff] at hs_lt
        simpa using hs_lt s ⟨bot_le, le_rfl⟩
      linarith [norm_nonneg (stoppedValue X τ ω)]
    · rw [stoppedValue, min_eq_right (not_lt.mp hs_lt)]
      have : 0 ≤ K := by
        by_contra hK; push_neg at hK
        have : τ ω = ⊥ := by
          apply le_bot_iff.mp; apply hittingAfter_le_of_mem; simp; simp [Set.mem_Ici];
          linarith [norm_nonneg (X ⊥ ω)]
        rw [stoppedValue]
        simp only [this, WithTop.untopA_coe]
        linarith [norm_nonneg (X ⊥ ω)]
      linarith [norm_nonneg (stoppedValue X τ ω)]
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem h, add_zero]
    have h_lt : ↑s < τ ω := lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hs) (not_le.mp h)
    rw [stoppedValue, min_eq_left h_lt.le]
    have : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
      rw [hittingAfter_lt_iff] at h_lt
      simpa using h_lt s ⟨bot_le, le_rfl⟩
    exact le_of_lt this

    apply le_of_lt

  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥

      · have h_not_mem : ‖X s ω‖ ∉ Set.Ici K := by
          intro h_in

          exact not_le.mpr hs this

          _ ≤ K + ‖X (τ ω) ω‖ := le_add_of_nonneg_right (norm_nonneg _)
      · have : s = τ ω := le_antisymm h' (not_lt.mp hs)
        rw [this]
        refine le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (by linarith) le_rfl
    · refine le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (by linarith) le_rfl
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem h, add_zero]
    apply iSup₂_le
    intro s hs
    have h_lt : s < τ ω := lt_of_le_of_lt hs (lt_of_not_ge h)
    have h_not_mem : ‖X s ω‖ ∉ Set.Ici K := by
      intro h_in
      have : τ ω ≤ s := hittingAfter_le_of_mem ⟨bot_le, h_in⟩
      exact not_le.mpr h_lt this
    rw [Set.mem_Ici, not_le] at h_not_mem
    rw [min_eq_left (le_of_lt h_lt)]
    exact le_of_lt h_not_mem

    exact this
